title: Article Type: runbook
description: Runbook articles describe a repeatable operational procedure: prerequisites, steps, rollback, and success criteria. They are the most time-sensitive article type — the Phase 4 Validator lifecycle check flags runbooks older than 5 years as 'requires verification'. Required body sections: Summary, Prerequisites, Steps, Rollback, Success Criteria.

x-lifecycle.description: Runbooks older than 5 years are surfaced by validator/lifecycle as requiring re-verification.
